utterance: How many shots were taken from beyond 28 feet?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance > 28
notes: Deep 3 / half-court range. distance in whole feet. Verified: 140 shots.

utterance: How many of those went in?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance > 28 AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: carries distance > 28 forward; adds made_flag = 1.

utterance: How many shots were taken within 4 feet of the basket?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance <= 4
notes: Restricted area / layup range. distance <= 4 feet. Verified: 2221 shots.

utterance: What was the shooting percentage from that range?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE distance <= 4
notes: Turn 2: carries distance <= 4; adds FG% metric. Highest expected percentage in dataset.

utterance: How many shots came from between 15 and 20 feet?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 15 AND 20
notes: Classic mid-range elbow range. BETWEEN 15 AND 20 feet. Verified: 440 shots.

utterance: How many were made from that distance?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance BETWEEN 15 AND 20 AND made_flag = 1
notes: Turn 2: same distance range; adds made_flag = 1.

utterance: Were there any shots from half court or beyond?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance >= 47
notes: NBA half court = ~47 feet. distance >= 47. Tests extreme distance range; verified max distance = 76ft in dataset.

utterance: What is the average shot distance in the dataset?
gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(distance), 1) as avg_distance FROM shot_charts
notes: AVG(distance) with ROUND to 1 decimal. Useful baseline characteristic of the shot profile.

utterance: What is the average distance on made shots versus missed shots?
gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 'made' ELSE 'missed' END as result, ROUND(AVG(distance), 1) as avg_distance FROM shot_charts GROUP BY made_flag ORDER BY made_flag DESC
notes: CASE WHEN labels + AVG(distance) per outcome. Tests whether makes cluster closer to basket than misses.

utterance: How many shots were taken at exactly 0 feet — dunks and tip-ins?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE distance = 0
notes: distance = 0 captures dunks, layup tip-ins at the rim. Verified: 489 shots.

utterance: What percentage of 0-foot attempts were made?
gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN made_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / COUNT(*) as fg_pct FROM shot_charts WHERE distance = 0
notes: Turn 2: distance = 0 carried; FG% metric. Expected very high — dunks rarely missed.

utterance: How many shots came from the left side of the court?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x < 0
notes: x < 0 = left side of court (x is negative for left, positive for right in nba_api coordinate system). No distance filter.

utterance: How many came from the right side?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE x > 0
notes: Turn 2: mirrors pair 12. x > 0 = right side. Together reveals court side shot distribution.

utterance: How many contested shots were there?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE defender IS NOT NULL
notes: Bug: defender column is NULL for all 7396 rows — ShotChartDetail API does not provide defender information. Returns 0. SQL structurally correct. Annotation note: any NL query about 'contested' shots must be flagged clarification_needed — data is unavailable in this endpoint.

utterance: How many shots were taken with less than 5 seconds left in the period?
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM shot_charts WHERE (minutes_remaining * 60 + period_seconds_remaining) <= 5
notes: Bug 11 resolved: minutes_remaining backfilled. Verified: 229 shots in final 5 seconds of any period.
